no_badge_text: If you don't have your badge, no problem, you can also buy snacks with your smartphone.
no_account_text: To use SimPad (the tablet of the Simba application), you must already be logged into the application from a computer with this link
no_account_text_qr: or with your smartphone using this QR code:
tutorial_step1_title: How would you like to pay?
tutorial_step1_text: Choose your payment method before getting started.
tutorial_cash_text: Click this button to continue in cash payment mode.
tutorial_simba_text: Scan this QR code with your phone to open Simba.
tutorial_cash_select_text: Select the item you want to purchase.
tutorial_simba_select_text: Hold your badge near the reader and pick your name from the list.
tutorial_cash_pay_text: Don't forget to put the money in the pig (the piggy bank) after your purchase.
tutorial_simba_pay_text: Choose your item and proceed to payment.
tutorial_step2_text: Hold your ID-Post badge near the reader to identify yourself. No badge? Use your smartphone via the QR code.
tutorial_step3_text: Browse the available products and pick what you like. Your purchases are automatically recorded.
tutorial_step4_text: Payment is automatically charged at the end of the month. You can check your history on the Simba app.
